name: FilterBox.Helpers

values.name: basic
values.comment: Basic matching using current text as a regex

values.name: caseInsensitive
values.comment: Same as basic matching but case insensitive

values.name: getKeys
values.comment: Helper function to create a `getFilterKeys` function out of a static list of matches.
values.type: (String -> List String -> List InputMatch) -> List String -> String -> Task String (List InputMatch)

values.name: getValues
values.comment: Helper function to create a `getFilterValues` function out of a static dictionary of matches.
values.type: (String -> List String -> List InputMatch) -> Dict String (List String) -> String -> String -> Task String (List InputMatch)

values.name: simple
values.comment: The sample list of matches regardless of current text

name: FilterBox

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
All configuration options for the filter box

If `getFilterKeys` is specified, it will be passed the current text to provide a list of matches.

If `getFilterValues` is specified, it will be passed the selected key and current text to provide a list of matches.

aliases.name: InputMatch
aliases.comment:
InputMatches are displayed underneath the search box as suggestions when available.

When all the strings in `match` are joined together they form the suggestion. If the boolean with each string is `True` then that section of the string will be bolded indicating the matching section of the string. See FilterBox.Helpers for an example.

`description` is an optional description of the suggestion. If provided it will be displayed beside the suggestion.

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: Holds the state of the filter search box

values.name: view
values.comment: The view takes the model and displays a filter box
